stats.changes:
We have updated on May 29th to the latest incentive plan.
Previous Allocation:
Acquisition: 30%
Activation LP: 20%
Activation Trade: 30%
Referral: 20%

New Allocation:
Acquisition: 36%
Activation_LP: 14%
Activation_Trade: 50%

Over the past month, we identified instances of self-referrals. We introduced a minimum trading volume requirement for referees to ensure that referrers only receive fee rebates if the referred wallets meet the volume threshold. Further analysis revealed a cluster of wallets referring each other. While we could implement new rules to prevent this, there is a risk of unforeseen loopholes. Therefore, we are reallocating incentives to prioritize the Activation Trade segment, as referrals and payouts are directly tied to trading volume.

Regarding LP incentives, we have partnered with Stakestone and will receive their points on Aark. This partnership strengthens our LP incentives, ensuring that rewards are based on fees generated by traders rather than direct team incentives. This adjustment is healthier for LPs, aligning rewards with trading activity.

Another matter is Aark decides to align with STIP.b and LTIPP rebate cap on trading fee of <75%. The benchmark follows GMX, Vertex, Synthetix and MUX, to make sure DAO’s funds are better spent. Arbitrum perp protocols will collectively make Arbitrum better!
stats.lessons:
During the 1st period, Aark team detected 3 issues and we will dynamically adjust our strategy in a more systematic way for further distribution. 
 	
Issue 1: Transparency. Since our reward handler contract can only indirectly reflect Galxe user data, we will upload the Galxe data manually per quest ends.
Issue 2. Lack of Exposure. In the incoming periods, Aark will partner with projects embedded with multi-chain features and involve more KoLs with a better reach in the target chains.
Issue 3: Hurdle for Eligibility. In the next period, we will adjust the participation requirement (e.g. targeted acquisition protocols, min deposit) to target more users.

actuals.summary:
Our incentives plan is breakdown into 4 parts
1/ Acquisition (Galxe): Aark is rewarding users from other Perp DEXs (Aevo, ApeX, ApolloX, Kwenta, KiloEX, Level Finance, and SynFutures) to trade on Aark. So far 1 eligible trader.
2/ Acquisition (DappOS Premium Competition): Aark partnered with DappOS to reward users who trade on Aark through DappOS's multi-chain wallet based on trading volume. So far 3157 traders made $29.9M trading volume.
3/ Activation (Trade): Aark is rewarding traders based on trading volumes. So far 148 made $343M trading volume.
4/ Activation (LP): Aark is rewarding LP based on the size of LP holdings relative to TVL with minimum LP size of $2,000. So far we have 44 eligible users.

1/ Acquisition: Galxe Event for other Perp DEX traders  
This is an exclusive Galxe campaign for users who have executed on-chain transactions worth more than or equal to $50 at Perp DEXs below. There will be a total of 12 campaigns and each will last for a week. The purpose is to catalyze the growth of Arbitrum ecosystem by bringing users from other chains:
Aevo, ApeX, ApolloX, Kwenta, KiloEX, Level Finance, and SynFutures.
Allocation: 17,000 $ARB per week
Duration: June 13th - June 20th.
For details on the event: https://aarkdigital.medium.com/aark-arb-incentive-program-3-calling-perp-dex-traders-to-moon-mode-6b93a11d1120
Eligible Users: 1


2/ Acquisition(1-2): DappOS Premium Competition
Traders, making trading volumes through DappOS, receive $ARB based on their trading volumes. DappOS is a multi-chain wallet which allows users from different chains to use Aark.
Allocation: 50,000 $ARB for 2 weeks
Duration: June 4th - June 18th.
For details on the event: https://medium.com/@dappos.com/premium-trading-competition-cb0da7ad13c1
Eligible Users: 3157 traders who made $29.9M trading volume in total.


3/ Activation_Trade: Aark’s Native Event for Traders.
By trading with Classic Mode and Moon Mode on Aark, traders receive $ARB based on their weekly trading volumes. There will be a total of 12 weeks of epoch.
Allocation: 37,500 $ARB per week
Duration: June 5th - June 12th
For details on the event:
https://aarkdigital.medium.com/aark-new-token-mining-unveil-j-3cdfe2d36771
Eligible Users: 148 who made $343M trading volume in total.


4/ Activation_LP: Aark’s Native Event for LPs.
LPs earn $ARB weekly, based on their LST/LRT average collateral size for a week relative to the total TVL of LST/LRT deposits in the LP pool. To be eligible, users must maintain their LP size more than or equal to $2000. There will be a total of 12 weeks of epoch. 
Allocation: 10,500 $ARB per week
Duration: June 5th - June 12th
For details on the event:
https://aarkdigital.medium.com/aark-arb-incentive-program-for-liquidity-providers-21bd8b6a76f3
Eligible Users: 44 users
actuals.disclosures:
57,000 ARB have been allocated to quest platforms for acquisition. Not all users who participated in the quest claimed ARB. 
37,500 ARB have been allocated to trading rewards and 10,500ARB have been allocated to LP rewards. There may be ARB rewards that the users haven't claimed. 
Total : 105,000ARB

planned.expectations:
As our partnership continues to boost, we will mainly adjust the Acquisition part for our next bi-weekly period.
Aark will shift more focus to our newest and incoming partners. For example, DappOS, with its intent-centric infrastructure with Aark's innovative perpDEX, we're set to bring unmatched synergy and a seamless leverage experience to on-chain assets of all kinds. The total budget: 50,000 ARB, 25,000 ARB per Week. Min volume: $10,000
We will raise the lucky draw incentive to 10 ARB for user acquisition from other chain perp DEX users, make a more flexible policy for minimum deposit and add 3 more target exchanges.
Active users: Minimum deposit of $50 or $100 for 3 months
Target exchanges: KiloEx / ApeX / Kwenta / Synthetix / Level / ApolloX / Holdstation / Aevo / Satori Finance / Synfutures

stats.changes:
We have re-designed the Acquisition part, as in the last round we encountered hurdle of eligibility. This time we make a new quest with adjust acquisition strategy, allowing user's 1st Aark adoption less complicated and longer deposit. This time 50,000 ARB have been allocated to a new quest campaign for acquisition. Expecting to acquire 5,000 - 10,000 users, in contrast on last time 1 eligible user for Acquisition.

As our partnership continues to boost, we will mainly adjust the Acquisition part for our next bi-weekly period.
Aark will shift more focus to our newest and incoming partners. For example, starting from July 3rd, we will launch a quest campaign on Coinseeker to tap into regions with new users who will be required to 1) purchase $AARK from DEXs on Arbitrum or CEXs, 2) Stake $AARK on Aark's platform, 3) execute on-chain TXs on Aark to receive $ARB. Since this is the first Coinseeker campaign, we are guaranteed a high level of support from the project to maximize the synergy and acquire as many users as possible. The total budget is 50,000 ARB for a month. 
We'll also continue collaborating with DappOS, which has brought over 3k users from different chains during the previous 2 week campaign. This time, we'll catalyze the participation even more by emphasizing the on double rewards chance where users can earn $ARB from LTIPP and points from DappOS.

stats.lessons: During the 2nd period, we learned from our 1st distribution by dynamically adjust our strategy in a more systematic way. We also impressed by the DAU that is boosted from partners (Dappos and more to come). In the next round we will launch more quest on detailed step to educate users to be a stickier user on Aark.

actuals.summary:
Our incentives plan is breakdown into 3 parts in this distribution
- Acquisition: 50,000 ARB have been allocated to a new quest campaign for acquisition, but since it will be live starting from July 3rd, the ARB is yet to be claimed by users. Expecting to acquire 5,000 - 10,000 users.
- Activation (Trade): Aark is rewarding traders based on trading volumes. 37,500 $ARB per week. For the 2 week period, 177 made $152M trading volume.
- Activation (LP): Aark is rewarding LP based on the size of LP holdings relative to TVL with minimum LP size of $2,000. 10,500 $ARB per week. So far we have 86 eligible users with a TVL of $8.2M.
actuals.disclosures:
- 75,000 ARB have been allocated to trading rewards and 21,000ARB have been allocated to LP rewards. There may be ARB rewards that the users haven't claimed. 
- Total : 96,000ARB

stats.changes: We continue to optimize our Acquisition strategy. In the 2nd round distribution, we have greatly improve our claim methodology and our eligibility requirements. We have shorten the campaign duration to attract new users / exisitng users with more diverse campaigns and fun. Aside from fun, we also 500% new traders inflow, making $1.2B trading volume in 2 weeks span.

planned.expectations:
We'll launch more campaigns requiring users to execute on-chain actions to earn $ARB for our next bi-weekly period.
1. We'll launch a Galxe campaign that requires users to make $1000 profit using $100 margin. Since this will be exclusively targeting users who were eligible for sizeable airdrops such as zk, blast, etc, we expect to onboard significant numbers of airdrop hunters who are still willing to participate in events where they are required to execute onchain transactions. 2. We'll launch another co-marketing event with DappOS to attract users from different chains. Participants will earn $ARB based on their trading volumes every week. We expect a great synergy, as the market anticipates a potential airdrop from DappOS. The total budget allocated will be 50,000 $ARB for 4 weeks.

stats.changes: We consistently pursue the optimized methodologies starting from July15th. Especially for TVL side, we maintain the an average new acc inflow of $ 200k per account to validate our methodology. Acquisition wise, we expect 5000 users and so far we have 3590 users one week away from the end of this campaign. We will continue adjust the eligibility requirements and claim methodology to our latest result.
stats.lessons: During the 4th period, we leveraged insights from the previous distribution phases to dynamically and systematically refine our strategy. Based on user data analytics, we plan to launch new campaigns aimed at attracting degen traders, thereby enhancing overall user retention. Additionally, we have observed a conversion between LPs and traders within our user base, which confirms our hypothesis regarding user transition.

stats.changes: This is the consistent with the last 4 rounds and we are closer to our inital target of traders increase. We are hosting a Moon Listing Event with top 20 Binance Perps assets. In the first week, 50 new users drove 50% of last week's trading volume, all with a $10k ARB allocation We will continue adjust the eligibility requirements and claim methodology to our latest result.
stats.lessons: During the 5th period, we outreached to as many top protocols as we can for user inflows and guide the traffic to Aark. Based on our analytics, we foresee Layer3 quest as super efficient for new user conversion, and Tethermax collab for user retention.

actuals.summary:
Our incentives plan is breakdown into 4 parts
- Acquisition: 50,000 ARB have been allocated to a quest campaign on Coinseeker. Users are required to execute various on-chain actions on Aark to receive tickets to join the raffle. So far, 3,592+ users participated. The claim will be available at the end of the campaign in 1 week.
- Activation (Trade): Aark is rewarding traders based on trading volumes. 37,500 $ARB per week. For the 2 week period, 798 made $152M trading volume.
- Activation (LP): Aark is rewarding LP based on the size of LP holdings relative to TVL with minimum LP size of $2,000. 10,500 $ARB per week. So far we have 37 eligible users with a avg TVL of $7.6M.

planned.changes:
For the remaining epochs, we plan on executing various events to acquire new users in different areas.

1. We are running a Moon Listing Event, during which Aark lists assets from the top 20 on Binance Perps in volume. During the first week, we acquired 50 new users who took up 50% of the total trading volumes last week. We achieved this performance with a 10k $ARB allocation; therefore, for the next 2 weeks, we will extend the budget to reach out to a bigger audience to acquire more users.

2. We'll launch a Layer3 quest campaign that requires users to execute on-chain actions on Aark. Considering that Layer3 is one of the most renowned quest platforms, we expect to acquire at least 3-5k participants. With the synergy of the ongoing Moon Listing Event, we've increased the chance of increasing the retention of those users who are funneled by the Layer3 event.

3. We've just launched a trading competition collaborating with Tethermax and dappOS. For 2 weeks from now on, participants will have the chance to be rewarded with $ARB based on their trading volume. The total budget allocated is 50k ARB. Tethermax's userbase is heavily focused on CEX traders, and dappOS provides a multichain wallet that allows users access to services from other chains. With these attributes of partners, we are expanding our exposure to a new segment of users who are expected to create a sizeable volume as they are already familiar with trading.
planned.expectations:
- 54,000 ARB have been allocated to quest platforms and internal marketing campaigns for acquisition. Not all users who participated in the quest claimed ARB. 
- 75,000 ARB have been allocated to trading rewards and 21,000ARB have been allocated to LP rewards. There may be ARB rewards that the users haven't claimed. - Total : 96,000ARB

stats.changes: We continue to optimize our Acquisition strategy. In the 2nd round distribution, we have greatly improve our claim methodology and our eligibility requirements. We have shorten the campaign duration to attract new users / exisitng users with more diverse campaigns and fun. Aside from fun, we also 500% new traders inflow, making $1.2B trading volume in 2 weeks span.
stats.lessons: During the 6th peroid, we have learnt from the first two distribution by dynamically adjust our strategy in a more systematic way. After user data analytics, we expect to onboard degen traders with new campaigns, so we can improve the general stickness of our user base. Furthur more, our user base has seen a conversion between LPs and traders, which validate our assumption of user conversion.

For the remaining epochs, we plan on executing various events to acquire new users in different areas.

1. We are running a Moon Listing Event, during which Aark lists assets from the top 20 on Binance Perps in volume. So far we've acquired 288 users and $1.3B cumulative volumes from this event. 2. We've launched a quest campaign on TaskOn that requires users to execute on-chain actions on Aark. We plan to increase the brand awareness of Aark by encouraging users to participate in easier tasks via a quest platform with a significant influence in the market. We'll launch another quest campaign from different platforms to acquire more users.
 
3. We've just launched a trading competition collaborating with Tethermax and dappOS. For the remaining week from now on, participants will have the chance to be rewarded with $ARB based on their trading volume. The total budget allocated is 50k ARB. Tethermax's userbase is heavily focused on CEX traders, and dappOS provides a multichain wallet that allows users access to services from other chains. With these attributes of partners, we are expanding our exposure to a new segment of users who are expected to create a sizeable volume as they are already familiar with trading.

4. As we announce our Discord community's renewal, we'll launch various Discord events, such as rewarding users who have shared their PnLs or trading strategies. With these opportunities, we plan on boosting community engagement, which will attract more users and eventually stay as active traders.
